root: ^Noelle: Woah! This one is so pretty! How is it so shiny?
^Sam: They call them Rainbow Trout, something about the way their scales grow makes them shine all rainbow like that.
^Noelle: I wish I could keep one as a pet! It looks so cool!
^Sam: Maybe if we put this one in a bucket of water, it'll stay alive for a while longer... Let me go look for one.
^Noelle: Awesome! Pet rainbow fish, here I come!
